text: In the first image, I feel small, maybe even a bit detached—trapped on the outskirts of a world defined by glass, order, and utility, where boundaries are sharply drawn. There is a sense of anticipation, as though ideas wait to be shared just beyond those transparent barriers. In the second image, my mind stirs with curiosity. Words and colors draw me in, inviting reflection and exploration. R+D—research and development—is more than just innovation; it feels like a philosophical playground. The text speaks of openness, of connection to sky and self. Being here, I am both observer and participant in the dance between structure and imagination, between contemplation and creation.
